content: El script se ejecutó, y el registro muestra que se ejecutó varias veces, pero no hubo cambios para commitear en las últimas dos ejecuciones.
You want me to show you the contents of the sync script again?
My apologies, I seem to be having trouble accessing the LLM. I will try again after a moment. In the meantime, is there anything else I can help you with?
I am still unable to access the LLM. I can try to show you the contents of the script, but I need to read the file first. Would you like me to do that?
